textByHash.2f33d5ae0036a0e792409217ea2bfa4e94b99333: Hello again. What can I do for you?
textByHash.9f086dc453dc3ac2fb8b0748d5b7c4087fac68f8: Oh, the one with the monocle? Yes, he did come in.
textByHash.287ee8101a1940e64d48da65920a79107cbf32bc: What? What does that even mean?
textByHash.6d23756968a45f35f42964c420fc14fefe4270c7: No, he came in looking to buy some runes, but he didn't really know what he was looking for.
textByHash.0453e6ea0fa82b77f13b308b73586601181987b7: I don't know. He took a look at my stock, but didn't see what he wanted. He then left.
textByHash.6d3cb8d6335a5299363369294929dcff13d178c8: I did take some notes. It was driving me crazy trying to make sense of it!
textByHash.8cb8fe7409fee217e39ff7686e4d0b852a9caa37: Be my guest! Good luck making sense of them.
textByHash.7b24dfd14072f2950bcd743b389db87c4b094946: Not a clue. Maybe you can figure out what he was trying to cast.
textByHash.224556e418457f64aa5bfa1d7768ea0a58fde44e: Oh really? Please do tell. It's been driving me crazy!
textByHash.c565558958ad3735402f19bd3fe29021034d0bee: Ah, of course. I'm not sure how I didn't figure that out!
textByHash.163a897407281fe3da1a0b366fb6db2a66be63c7: This is true deary, I'll need an empty vial.
textByHash.b46a7ecd5016094c13109a276fac88a97e06bf09: That's good, now you'll need to make a rose tinted lens. Pink dye can be made from red berries in this bottle to make redberry juice, then add white berries. Just use that on a bullseye lens.
textByHash.9088de0ba63b580371be937029465f068404a1d1: Hello deary! Have you managed to make that lens yet?
textByHash.202d3166d8647fa415fba6819223be8a6a494994: Pink dye can be made from red berries in the bottle I gave you. Add white berries to make the pink dye and then you just need to use that on a bullseye lens. Good luck!
textByHash.94589769e25c6a516bd02bfce0a9fddb4fe3c34c: Wonderful deary. When you're ready, just stand in the open doorway and focus the light on the empty vial on my desk and I'll pour the serum into it.
textByHash.223ab0b19f8486bd83d966fd79487ccb3430aa62: Why it makes the person who drinks it unable to hide in the shadow of lies. The light of truth will shine!
textByHash.22b555422f2f354b3aaa5fe26eb1f509f2038205: Ok, now the last ingredient, something personal from the person you need to tell the truth, else it won't work!
textByHash.10e93e845e937c3d2bcca4f5e0deba84fa295d1c: Don't forget to dilute it in something like tea or coffee.
textByHash.f3da5da467680daf8bed401870891475fcf977a7: Hello deary! How did the serum work?
textByHash.55fb6e6e442e41f3ac500a2b4f3f56741d6d347d: That's not a problem, I kept some of it here just in case, but you have no space for it! Come back when you do
textByHash.4bef286a99bbab683bbd10dc42175d20f66d6fa7: That's not a problem, I kept some of it here just in case, here you are!
textByHash.d301039a58b54b732a51ec6231440926efa58e90: Well don't forget to dilute it in a drink or something else bad things might happen.
textByHash.f4ec1b4d6ad51600fbb313d6ec79d191dc4e3010: Hello again deary. Come back and tell me what happened when all the fuss is over.
textByHash.1d3c1087f35e26b6c3651ddbddea3af07c22f594: Enriched snapdragon, eh? There's only one person who'd be wanting one of those. So you're working with Thaerisk now?
textByHash.226959aa4246e676b4f1b27c24bae0c05b5644e5: Actually, on second thoughts, probably best I don't ask.
textByHash.4f90dd4cb6558e9f99becc71e8340077f17cc121: I can help you make the enriched snapdragon seed, but you'll then need to grow it yourself. If that's okay with you, you'll need to bring me a regular snapdragon seed.
textByHash.c18e8b589448ab75370db9561d752f6358b8de75: Right, you now need to enrich the seed using light from the doorway filtered through a rose-tinted lens.
textByHash.e7f97589ce22225a681479f92440003e51c075cc: Well I can sell you the colouring needed, but you'll have to provide your own lantern lens.
textByHash.edc02f2d60af75122f670c3ac14972baedd84eb5: I've placed your snapdragon seed on the counter. You now need to enrich the seed using light from the doorway filtered through a rose-tinted lens.
textByHash.363fef66a2dbc042a4d63020d97b6a38a6ab701f: Well if you have your own lantern lens, then I can sell you the pink dye needed to colour it.
textByHash.2e7e48237c0a1bab00c08b2bdee7e6754119d0db: The seed is all ready for you. Just pick it up from the counter. After that, you'll need a specially prepared patch to grow it.
textByHash.384ebf024845cc1d79254c8e662616535838918d: Now you need to grow it, but you'll need a specially prepared patch to do so.
textByHash.04368c8a50b0f6cf9d8adb65b30cf8ff133b70de: Hello there. Welcome to my magic emporium.
textByHash.cbd6e9e73df6b675654aacab8a6130ab2bca99ce: Well, if you see anyone who is, please send them my way.
textByHash.89de861873064f3abb4e8537062b73460c53962d: Of course. It's 20 coins per bottle.
textByHash.a32e3f7ba254b7165c9f8f0cc0afff31f9e3fcf9: Good job. I have new information to share with you.
